channel.title: Smart Habitat
channel.description: Fresh takes for smart-home tinkerers and privacy-minded automators.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: local smart home no cloud
item.description: The persistent myths around local smart home no cloud, stress-tested against what smart-home tinkerers and privacy-minded automators actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your sensors in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying sensors project for smart-home tinkerers — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/homeautomation is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the lighting community this week.

item.title: Getting Started with Smart Sensors
item.description: Start building your smart home with these sensors

item.title: Mastering Routine Automation
item.description: Streamline your daily routine with automation

item.title: The Benefits of Local Control Systems
item.description: Take control of your smart home with local control systems

item.title: Getting Started with Smart Lighting
item.description: Brighten up your smart home with smart lighting

item.title: Addressing Sensor Privacy Concerns
item.description: Protect your privacy with secure sensor practices

item.title: Optimizing Your Smart Home Routines
item.description: Get the most out of your smart home with optimized routines
